LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A PERSONAL DISCLOSURE, NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION AND WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION. DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $600, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Discovery Responses And Mtn For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Terence Rayner, Atty. for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Mary Francis
No appearances made by Defendant.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant City And County Of San Francisco's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $600, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 2/22/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
